song.title: Agnus Dei
song.author: Michael W. Smith
song.lyrics:
[V1] .G C G Alleluia .G C Alleluia . C G For our Lord God Almighty reigns .G C G Alleluia .G C Alleluia . C G For our Lord God Almighty reigns .G C Alleluia
[C] . G G Holy, holy . Em D Are You Lord God Almighty . C Worthy is the Lamb . C Worthy is the Lamb . G G You are holy, holy . Em D Are you Lord God Almighty . C Worthy is the Lamb . C Worthy is the Lamb . G You are holy.
